bargaining_unit_name: Teamsters Local 97 (all regularly employed attorneys of the City of Newark, including assistant corporation counsels, public defenders, zoning attorneys, and municipal prosecutors; excludes managerial/confidential/supervisory staff, craft employees, police employees, and several named senior Law Department titles)
binding_arbitration_statute: New Jersey Employer-Employee Relations Act (N.J.S.A. 34:13A-1 et seq., Ch. 13A)
total_comp_note: Hosted on the NJ PERC public-sector-contracts database (state labor board domain), high provenance. Recognition-clause-first review corrected an initial misclassification: despite the 'Teamsters' union name, Article 1 (Recognition) reads verbatim that this unit covers 'all regularly employed attorneys employed by the City of Newark' -- a municipal legal/attorney unit, NOT sanitation or public works as the union name alone might suggest. No schema-supported class fits 'municipal attorneys'; occupation_class=other is the correct, conservative classification per the recognition-clause-first standard.
